items.content_html: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window. So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid. Enjoy it!
items.title: gitcpy/mermaid-zoom-drag: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window.  So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid.  Enjoy it!

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that displays all open notes in a tab group as if they were a single continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Open all notes in Continuous Mode from a folder, search results, or links in a file; use arrow keys to navigate between notes; reorder notes via tab header drag-and-drop, sorting, more.
items.title: gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode: An Obsidian plugin that displays all open notes in a tab group as if they were a single continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Open all notes in Continuous Mode from a folder, search results, or links in a file; use arrow keys to navigate between notes; reorder notes via tab header drag-and-drop, sorting, more.
